name: Sweet Potato Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients.
2. Add the shortening and mashed sweet potatoes and mix thoroughly.
3. Knead the dough; if it is sticky, add a bit more flour.
4. Cut the dough with a biscuit cutter.
5. Bake in an oven preheated to 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes.
